productName: Doozies - Peach 1:1 ELEVATE 10 Pack (80g) (100mg CBD;100mg THC)
description: A chef-inspired soft, juicy peach edible with dessert-counter personality, smooth sweetness, and a carefully blended cannabis infusion. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 1:1 ratio. For an uplifting, energetic experience.
